heading: Personnel exchanges
label: 3712 Personnel exchanges
text: The Secretary, the Secretary of Energy, and the Director of the National Science Foundation, jointly, shall establish a program to foster the exchange of scientific and technical personnel among academia, industry, and Federal laboratories. Such program shall include both (1) federally supported exchanges and (2) efforts to stimulate exchanges without Federal funding.
notes: Amendments2005— substituted “, the Secretary of Energy, and the Director of the National Science Foundation” for “and the National Science Foundation”.Pub. L. 109–58
amendments: Amendments2005— substituted “, the Secretary of Energy, and the Director of the National Science Foundation” for “and the National Science Foundation”.Pub. L. 109–58
